creator: sunpoet@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Yuri Victorovich from comment #0)

I replied your private mail several months ago. It says:

> Please feel free to remove devel/py-cachecontrol.
> 
> Besides the removal, please also update www/py-cachecontrol to include the following changes:
> - Use lowercase PORTNAME (It must be the reason that I did not find www/py-cachecontrol in the beginning)
> - Fix LICENSE. It should be APACHE20
> - Add FILECACHE and REDIS options
> 
> And do not forget to update your devel/py-orange-canvas-core from devel/py-cachecontrol to www/py-cachecontrol.
